# Asset Prompts

Generated from `public/assets/assets.manifest.json`.

## pickup.apple.v2

- Biome: `suburb`
- Style: `anime, japan`
- Gameplay tags: `food, starter`

```text
Create a stylized 3D pickup.apple.v2 pickup for a Katamari-like game. Anime-inspired visual language with Japanese motifs. Target biome: suburb. Keep silhouette readable at distance, low-poly friendly, and export-ready to GLB with centered pivot and Y-up orientation. Avoid thin noisy geometry. Include personality through color blocking and simple secondary forms.
```
